VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.name: Levels
VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.hint: Add level background token hiding controls.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.description: Adds the Hide tokens under floor checkbox to Level settings and hides lower tokens under opaque level background pixels.
VORFALE_TWEAKS.levels.HideTokensUnderFlo: Uses this level's background image as the floor mask. Tokens below the level are hidden under opaque pixels and can be seen through transparent pixels using Foundry's standard visibility.
